memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection in the Brain architecture.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Committed Brain DB as the intended source of truth.
Committed Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as a strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram addition and model choice as open questions, not decisions.
